name: Rebuild the Rusty Sword
text: You replace three bad rivets and one load-bearing superstition. The sword becomes respectable enough to resent its old name.

name: Reinforce the Satchel
text: You add hidden seams, doubled straps, and a pocket whose geometry would upset a surveyor.

name: Pack Honeyed Rations
text: The result is sticky, durable, and capable of surviving a minor dynasty.

name: Make Field Antiseptic
text: Half the ale goes into the bandages. The other half assists the manufacturing staff.

name: Ward the Rope
text: Every knot now resembles a tiny legal objection to the supernatural.

name: Cross-Reference the Evidence
text: The voice on the crystal mentions a road absent from the map. The omission is more useful than either object was alone.

name: Build a Surveyor's Kit
text: You align the map to the cracked lens. Every old error points toward something deliberately hidden.

name: Assemble a Probability Engine
text: The chip predicts the dice perfectly, except when observed, wagered upon, or needed. It still improves your planning.

name: Ferment Monster Bait
text: It smells like a tavern floor acquired legal personhood. Large predators should adore it.

name: Consecrate the Lucky Rock
text: The rock accepts sainthood immediately and with suspicious confidence.
